message:
test: add 9 proptest properties for runtime telemetry log filters and normalization

Cover filter_by_kind, filter_by_tier, filter_by_component,
filter_by_correlation, drain semantics, count_tier consistency,
UnifiedTelemetryRecord::from_runtime_event field preservation,
unified record serde roundtrip, and eviction counter tracking.
18→27 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
